rounds: Two weeks of going through the motions — routine held, which counts, but it was protective holding, not proud holding. The Apollo ring moment is the clearest loss we've got: someone literally asked about the half-naked man on your finger and you closed the door on them. That was yours to open.
pattern: They're not loud right now — they're just quietly making you smaller in the moments that actually matter.
focus: One stranger gets the Apollo ring story this week.
